content: I was looking at page-flags.h in include/linux and I noticed above the definition for the pageflags enum the documentation says Don't use the pageflags directly. Use the PageFoo macros. However, I could not find any definition for or reference to a PageFoo macro. What exactly is PageFoo and how is it defined?
Foo just means the bits, PagePrivate for example they are defined in include/linux/page-flags.h using the PAGEFLAG macros
I also noticed that all page flags are typed with the alias gfp_t. What is the distinction between GFP flags and flags defined in page-flags.h?
are you sure about that? gfp_t flags are a separate set of flags used in page allocation
Oh so gfp_t flags are flags used for memory allocation, not setting the state of the page itself?
yes those are the flags you pass into things that allocate memory (get_free_pages)
